title: Create: Easy Stone Generators
description: Easier, lag-free stone generators using Create. Includes Cobblestone, Smooth Stone, Obsidian, Basalt, Limestone and Scoria generators.
body:
About

This lightweight mod introduces a simple and efficient way to generate all stone types using Create's machines.

Tired of building bulky and laggy cobblestone generators for your factories? Just throw the ingredients into a basin, and let the mechanical mixer do the rest!

List of generators

Vanilla:

Cobblestone (lava and water*)

Smooth Stone (lava and water*)

Obsidian (lava and water*, consumed in the process) (requires a heated blaze burner)

Basalt (lava, blue ice and soul soil)

Create:

Limestone (lava and honey)

Scoria (lava and chocolate)

*make sure to apply a filter to the basin to obtain the desired output

Preview

Dependencies

Only the base Create mod is required for the above recipes to work.

JEI is recommended but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
